title: Klue ties verified competitive insights to deal support and research mode
claim: Klue's Compete Agent is described as generating verified competitive insights from internal and public sources, with a research mode and continuous updates across the go-to-market ecosystem.
source_snippet: Compete Agent automates discovery and analysis from CRM, calls, internal docs, and public sources.
implication: ProductOS should combine public market research with internal product memory and keep verification status explicit when merging the two.
followup_questions: Which ProductOS research routes need separate handling for public versus internal source mixes?
